programmes.show_description: Swiss/French artist Noémi Büchi picks an hour of music.

Alexis Korner's 1983 profile of Scotty Moore, Elvis Presley's guitarist from his very first recordings on Sun Records until 1968. Scotty died in 2016.

Soundtrack the early hours with back-to-back music, plus exclusive BBC sessions.
Chris is joined by DJ and producer Jon Dasilva to talk about his new music and memories of the Madchester scene.

Anna Calvi joins ahead of the release of new collaborative EP, Is This All There Is? and also shares her musical DNA.
Comedians Flo & Joan stop by in Salford to chat to Craig all about their upcoming stand-up tour 'With Feeling'.
Huw has handpicked music, old and new, plus we round up the gigs, shows and festivals that everybody is talking about in today's Gig Lisztomania.
Reviewing this week's new releases.

programmes.show_name: The 6 Mix with Mary Anne Hobbs
programmes.show_description: DJ Flight is widely regarded as one of the foundations of Drum & Bass and a pioneer of dance music. She has been at the forefront championing underground music and eclectic sounds.
